data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Design elements are optimized for ease of access and interaction speed.
data.technical_spec: Interactive elements like buttons are positioned to reduce cursor travel time.

data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Streamlined interface design helps minimize user decision time by limiting choices.
data.technical_spec: User feeds are personalized to show the most relevant content using AI-driven algorithms.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Content is organized to enhance cognitive processing by limiting visible information.
data.technical_spec: Cap on visible notifications and post previews to prevent information overload.

data.title: Zeigarnik Effect
data.description: Encourages users to complete incomplete tasks within the application.
data.technical_spec: UI prompts and notifications draw attention to unfinished activities or messages.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Visually appealing designs are perceived as easier to use.
data.technical_spec: High-resolution images and intuitive icons improve the visual appeal and usability.
